// Journey

From Execution to Product thinking

Web & Graphic Designer

2017 - 2018

Started with visual and web design — building strong fundamentals in layout, usability, and interaction thinking.

Frontend Growth

2018 - 2019

Developed strong front-end skills with HTML & CSS, understanding how design translates into real interfaces

System Thinking

2019 - 2020

Optimized workflow by building reusable UI systems using PUG & SASS, focusing on scalability and consistency

2020 - 2022

Shifted into UI/UX design, focusing on usability, user behavior, and creating intuitive digital experiences

Senior Design Consultant

2022 - 2024

Transitioned into product design — solving real user problems, collaborating with teams, and contributing to product strategy.

Design Lead

2024 - Present

Leading design initiatives, driving business impact, and building scalable, user-centric digital products

Process & Skills

From idea to impact

A structured yet flexible approach to designing scalable digital products

Understand & Define

Discovery

I start by understanding user needs, business goals, and constraints — turning complexity into clear, actionable problem definitions.

Structure & Design

Design

Development
